name: Kualoa Ranch
tagline: Jurassic Valley ATV tours, horseback rides, and ziplines on a working cattle ranch — where they filmed Jurassic Park.
hours: Daily 7:30am–5:30pm; tours run on set schedules — book online in advance
bestTime: Morning tours have better light for Kualoa Valley photos and cooler temps
kamaaina: Kamaaina rates available with valid Hawaii ID — significant discount on tour packages
talkStory: This 4,000-acre working cattle ranch has been in the Morgan family since 1850, purchased from King Kamehameha III. The valley is considered one of the most sacred places on Oahu in Hawaiian tradition. Over 200 movies and TV shows have filmed here including Jurassic Park, Lost, and Hawaii Five-0. The 'Secret Island' beach -- included with some packages -- has calm shallow water and kayaks, the best-kept secret for families with young children.
